Description: Continuum ECS + Docker stack (VPC, VSwitch, SecurityGroup, Instance).

ImageId.Description: Ubuntu 22.04 image id for the target region

KeyPairName.Description: ECS key pair name for SSH

DashScopeApiKey.Description: DashScope API key (never commit real values)

ImageUrl.Description: Local or ACR image name (e.g. continuum:local or registry.../continuum:latest)

ZoneId.Description: Availability zone id for the VSwitch (required)

Fn::Sub:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update
apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg lsb-release
install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(. /etc/os-release && echo "$VERSION_CODENAME") stable" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list
apt-get update
apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
systemctl enable docker
systemctl start docker
mkdir -p /app/data
chmod 755 /app/data
IMAGE_URI='${ImageUrl}'
if [[ "$IMAGE_URI" == *".aliyuncs.com/"* ]]; then
  docker pull "$IMAGE_URI"
fi
docker rm -f continuum 2>/dev/null || true
docker run -d \
  --name continuum \
  --restart unless-stopped \
  -p 8000:8000 \
  -e DASHSCOPE_API_KEY='${DashScopeApiKey}' \
  -e CONTINUUM_AUTH_DISABLED=1 \
  -e CONTINUUM_CORS_ORIGINS='*' \
  -e CONTINUUM_DB_PATH=/app/data/continuum.db \
  -v /app/data:/app/data \
  "$IMAGE_URI"

PublicIp.Description: Public IP of the ECS instance
